title: Animecraft
description: Aims to add powers, weapons, and more from your favorite anime! Adds 17 anime powers and 7 fully 3D modelled anime weapons, a Colossal Titan entity, and more!
body:
Adds powers and weapons from anime such as Naruto, My Hero Acedamia, Death Note, Seven Deadly Sins, One Punch Man, and more! PLEASE, use whatever version is newest. I've likely fixed old bugs and have added new items, so don't cut your experience short of the best I have to offer!



Adds 17 anime powers, 7 fully 3-D modelled anime weapons, a Colossal Titan and even more awesome stuff! It's all survival friendly so there is no need to worry about not getting to use stuff, though lots of it is pretty lategame, with some items being locked behind the ender dragon, the wither, or even hundreds of diamonds or netherite. Below are two lists, a broad overview of everything interesting in the mod, and an in-depth comprehensive one. Feel free to use both of them to learn more about my mod!


Broad Overview:


The Death Note from Death Note

One Punch Man Powers from One Punch Man

The Colossal Titan from Attack on Titan

A magic system, with two staffs (so far) from Mushuko Tensei and Frieren : Beyond Journeys End

Pochita from Chainsaw Man

Lostvayne and Chastefol from Seven Deadly Sins

Rasengan and Chidori from Naruto

Bakugo and Todoroki powers from My Hero Acedamia

Luffy's Hat from One Piece

The Stone Mask and vampire powers from Jojo's Bizzare Adventure

Gon's Jajanken powers from Hunter X Hunter

Scissor Blade from Kill a Kill

A katana and shurikens

And more!





Comprehensive List:


Items:


Weebanium - Its found below y -20 and requires a diamond pick to mine. It is used to craft everything else in the mod, but be aware, its a little rarer than diamonds, and it might take longer to find than netherite.

Weebanium Block - 9 weebanium.

Compressed Diamond Block - Made of 9 diamond blocks, requires netherite to mine.

Animefier - Crafted using Weebamium, this is the crafting station you make everything at.

Book of Weeb - This is given to you when you first get a peice of weebanium, and has all the recipes for the mod in it.

Dragon Fang - Drops when you kill the ender dragon. Only one will drop per player.

Life Fiber - Every time you crit an enemy, there is a 1/500 chance it will drop. Heals you and gives you a "small" buff when used.

Temporary Ice - Dissapears after 5 seconds. Good for temporary bridges and would be great to avoid players chasing you. It's used in some powers.

Mana Flower - Used in mana regen potions. Level one potions can be upgraded using an iron ingot, and level two with a diamond.

Sticky Mud - Turns into normal mud after 700 ticks. Unobtainable, used in Quagmire for the Aqua Heartia.

Dragon Heart - Found in dragon fossils in the end, used to make the Aqua Heartia.

Abilities:


Explosion - Hand Explode - This is an item that makes a boom when you right click. It was the first item so it's kinda basic.

Explosion - Fly - Makes an explosion behind you that lets you fly, and doesn't break blocks. 

Explosion - Peircing Shot - It shoots a projectile that makes a bunch of explosions around it. It's very strong but also pretty expensive to make.

Jajanken - Rock - After a ten second charge time, it makes a HUGE explosion. This is probably unbalanced but it's fiiiiinnnee.

Jajanken - Paper - Shoots an orb that does okay damage. It's pretty weak but thats accurate to the show.

Jajanken - Scissors - It's just a melee weapon. Hit things with it. Kinda garbage. Quality wise, it's very op by normal standards.

Sin of Wrath - Full Counter - Hold in your offhand, and any damage you take is dealt 3 times back to the attacker. Also I know, this should only work on potions or something but that's lame.

Sin of Wrath - Assault Mode - Become OP and nearly invincible for a little, and then get very weak for a while. I like to call it, "Demon mode".

Shuriken - It's a throwing item. Things it hits bleed to death and get slowed down. 16 get made at a time.

Chakra - Rasengan - Ranged item that explodes where it hits, and accelerates over time. Very strong, and since speed makes things do more damage, the further away the more powerful.

Chakra - Chidori - After 5 seconds, charge forward at lighting speed and do a lot of damage to things. you can't go up or down tho.

Limit Breaker - The most overpowered item in the mod, this lets you train your body to an immeasurable level, but PLEASE, be aware, this will make litterally everything except mass distruction impossible after a while. Unless you figure out how to die, but thats pretty hard when you have the power of a god...

Half Hot - Flamethrower - Shoots a bunch of fire everywhere. Really fun to use in a dark oak forest and just let everything burn to the ground. ( I'm not a sadist, right? )

Half Hot - Flashfire Fist - A melee weapon that lunges you forward. It also summons fire where you walk. 

Half Cold - Glacial Freeze - Summons a HUGE glacier made of temporary ice. It does disappear, but it will destroy a lot of stuff before that. 10 second chrge time.

Half Cold - Flashfreeze Fist - Don't be deceived, depite looking like a melee weapon, this is really a movement item. Summons temporary ice below you and lets you move at great speed.

Death Note - The technically most overpowered item in the mod. Type an entity name in, and the closest one will die. Sadly, modded entities require the name of the mod and the a colon to work. Like this would kill the colossal titan entity. animecraft:colossal titan. Spaces get replaced with underscores so no need to use them when typing.

Weapons:


Katana - Basic weapon. Meant to make the mod more early game accessable.

Lostvayne - Crafted with the dragon fang, you can right click it to make a lot of clones to attack enemies. I hated making the holes in this so sorry if they suck.

Chastefol - (still ) The coolest thing in the mod. It's a levitating spear. Right click to rain 1000 spears on your enemies. Shift right click for a power boost. SO COOL! (just not in third person)

Scissor Blade - Most melee damage (weapon) in the mod, right click to dash forward and through enemies. Using this weapon signifigantly increases the chance for life fibers to drop, and is made from them. 

Pochita - HE'S SO CUTE!!!! Right-click to go chainsaw mode, but requires blood for such power. You can shift to cancel it. Shift right-click to summon Pochita to fight for you, but his attacks damage you too. Shift right-click him to pick him back up. Definetly the thing I'm most proud of lol. He's also a great way to mine for netherite, as he gives you haste 9000-ish.

Aqua Heartia - Lets you shifht click to open a menu to select 7 different iconic spells from Mushuko Tensei, Water Ball, Stone Bullet, Quagmire, Stone Bullet + (just a stronger version), Healing, Cumulonimbus, and Lightning.

Ancient Staff - Lets you cast 4 spells, flower field, barrier, zooltrak, and flight.

Armor:


Luffy's Hat - It's a straw hat. Mostly cosmetic.

Stone Mask - If you get blood on it, it will turn you into a vampire. You won't be able to go in light, be become very strong. Shift to go invisible, shift attack to turn others into vampires. Attack normally to steal life and hunger, and make enemies bleed out. Find in the Mask Cave. (see below)

Entities:


Lostvayne Clone - Summoned when using Lostvayne.

Pochita - Pochita on the ground.

Colossal Titan - Has a TON of health, and is a great punching bag for all of the stuff in the mod. Summon to test all the cool stuff in the mod! Only drops a lot of xp, good for levelling up if you are trying to become a god with Limit Breaker.

Structures:


Weebanium Geode - Find one of these bad boys and you will be rich.

Mask Cave - A structure with traps and tricks that contains the Stone Mask.

Dragon Fossil - Found in the end, has the Dragon Heart, which is required to make Aqua Heartia.

Cliffnotes:



This description applies to the newest version of the mod, so don't be annoyed when version 1.04 doesn't have the Colossal Titan, or anything else that literally wasn't added yet lol.

Everything is 3-D modelled by me, but obviously I didn't make any of the shows the items are from.

Probably won't update this anymore, might if I feel like it but likely this is the final version. Enjoy the mod!
